overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Firm activity this month and overall totals.
overview.noteBody: Costs are estimates based on the providers' public pricing. Self-hosted models (Ollama, Etalab's Albert, openai-compatible) are counted as 0 — infrastructure is billed separately.

cabinet.title: Firm configuration
cabinet.subtitle: Customise the firm identity used in generated documents (footer, legal notice) and certain UI defaults.
cabinet.nameHelp: Shown in the UI and used by default in the footer of documents generated via generate_document.
cabinet.footerHelp: Appears at the bottom of every page of generated DOCX/PDF files, to the left of the page number. Leave empty to hide it.
cabinet.disclaimerPlaceholder: Document generated by Louis. Does not constitute personalised legal advice without review by a lawyer.
cabinet.disclaimerHelp: Added on the last page of generated documents. You can override it on a case-by-case basis in the conversation.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# action recorded} other {# actions recorded}}. Append-only — account, provider and connector creations/changes, deletions, authentication.
audit.emptyBody: Admin actions and security events will be recorded here as soon as they occur.
audit.emptyFilteredBody: Widen the date range or change the filtered action.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Create your team members' accounts, track their AI usage and set a monthly spending cap per user. Each account stays isolated to its own providers, documents and conversations.
users.quotaInvalid: Enter a positive amount in euros.
users.deleteDescription: “{email}” will be deleted. All their data — provider keys, connectors, conversations, documents, workflows — will be permanently lost.
users.resetDescription: New password for {email}. The user must use it at their next sign-in — share it through a secure channel.
users.quotaDescription: AI spending cap in euros for {email} each calendar month. Beyond it, new requests are refused by Louis until the following month. Leave empty for no limit.
users.addUserDescription: Set a temporary password — the team member can change it in Settings after their first sign-in.
users.tempPasswordHelp: Minimum 10 characters. Send it to the user through a secure channel (password manager, encrypted messaging).
users.quotaExceeded: Quota exceeded — new AI requests are refused until next month.
